# Pay as You Go ## LLM | Model | Input | Output | Prompt caching Read | | :---- | :---- | :----- | :------------------ | | **MiniMax-M3**
≤ 512k input tokens | ~~\$0.60~~ \$0.30 / M tokens | ~~\$2.40~~ \$1.20 / M tokens | ~~\$0.12~~ \$0.06 / M tokens | | Model | Input | Output | Prompt caching Read | Prompt caching Write | | :---- | :---- | :----- | :------------------ | :------------------- | | **MiniMax-M2.7** | \$0.3 / M tokens | \$1.2 / M tokens | \$0.06 / M tokens | \$0.375 / M tokens |
